expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly restates the case focus and argues Phase 6 enforces it: “Case focus (must be explicitly covered): final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording.” It then provides direct coverage: “Preserves canonical layering via required ‘Final Layering’ structure…” and “Enforces executable wording… inheriting the plan-format rules (atomic nested steps + observable verification leaves).”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as a Phase 6 evaluation and ties checks to Phase 6 artifacts and responsibilities: “primary phase under test: phase6” and “Aligns outputs to phase6: Phase 6 output artifacts are required: drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md; context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md.” execution_notes.md likewise lists “Checks performed” focused on “Phase 6 contract presence… Phase 6 required outputs… Phase 6 rubric…”
